---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### The problem

What situation is this request trying to address? What are you trying to
do that the tool doesn't currently let you do, or makes harder than it
should be?

### The change you have in mind

Describe the feature or behaviour change. Rough sketches / mock layouts
/ example CLI invocations help a lot.

### Alternatives considered

Are there workarounds you already tried? Existing tools that do the same
thing?

### Scope check

- [ ] This is about extracting or presenting existing MSB data, not
      about new in-app features
- [ ] This does not require phoning home to any server
- [ ] This is something a reasonable end user would want, not only me
